summary: Iteration 14 Testing Complete - Real-Time Messaging System (WebSocket + REST) fully validated. All 22 backend tests passed (100%). All 15 frontend UI tests passed (100%). The complete messaging stack including WebSocket connections, message delivery, PropertyBanner, unread badges, online indicator, and contact-agent button are functioning correctly.

minor.issue: ConversationOut objects are constructed without property_image field (missing in ConversationOut constructor call in get_conversations endpoint). PropertyBanner will show fallback icon (orange square with MessageSquare icon) instead of real property image when opening from conversation list. Property title IS shown correctly.

integration_issues.issue: When ChatPanel is opened from PropertyDetailPage, both MessageButton's global WebSocket AND ChatPanel's WebSocket run simultaneously. MessageButton creates a WebSocket for real-time unread updates (always connected when token exists), while ChatPanel creates another WebSocket when activeConv is set. Works correctly in practice but uses double connections.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials - 200 OK with token
POST /api/auth/login with invalid password - 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/conversations?type=immobilier - 200 OK, returns list
GET /api/conversations?type=procedures - 200 OK, returns list
GET /api/conversations without auth - 401/403 correctly blocked
GET /api/conversations/unread-count - 200 OK with unread_count field
GET /api/conversations/unread-count?type=immobilier - 200 OK filtered
GET /api/conversations/unread-count?type=procedures - 200 OK filtered
POST /api/conversations (create) - 200 OK, creates conversation with participant_ids and type
POST /api/conversations (idempotent) - returns same conversation ID for duplicate request
POST /api/conversations with self - 400 Bad Request correctly returned
POST /api/conversations with property_id - property_id stored correctly
GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages - 200 OK with messages + conversation
GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages by non-participant - 403 Forbidden
GET /api/conversations/nonexistent/messages - 403/404 correctly returned
GET /api/users/{id}/online - 200 OK with boolean online field
GET /api/users/{random_id}/online - 200 OK with online=false for non-existent user
GET /api/users/{id}/online offline user has last_seen field
WebSocket /api/ws/chat connects and receives unread_update event on connect
WebSocket with invalid token - correctly rejected (ConnectionClosedError)
WebSocket without token - correctly rejected
WebSocket send message - new_message event received by recipient with correct content
frontend_ui_tests: MessageButton NOT visible on homepage (not logged in) - correct behavior
MessageButton NOT visible on homepage (logged in admin) - correct behavior
MessageButton visible on /immobilier when logged in
MessageButton visible on /procedures when logged in
ChatPanel shows 'Aucune conversation' or conversation list
contact-agent-btn [data-testid='contact-agent-btn'] visible on property NOT owned by user
PropertyBanner [data-testid='property-banner'] visible in chat with property title 'Appartement dixinn'
Chat input [data-testid='chat-message-input'] accepts text (black readable text)
Send button [data-testid='chat-send-btn'] enabled when message typed
Message sent via WebSocket - input cleared after send, message appears in chat
Unread badge [data-testid='message-unread-badge'] shows '1' when user has unread messages
Online indicator [data-testid='online-indicator'] green dot visible on admin avatar

action_items: MINOR: Fix GET /api/conversations endpoint to include property_image in ConversationOut constructor (add property_image=c.get('property_image') to the ConversationOut() call in get_conversations function in messages.py line ~226)
critical_code_review_comments: messages.py GET /api/conversations: ConversationOut is constructed without property_image - needs `property_image=c.get('property_image')` added to the ConversationOut() call to ensure PropertyBanner shows property image when opening from conversation list

Dual WebSocket connections: MessageButton (global) + ChatPanel (per-conversation) both create WebSocket connections. Consider sharing a single WebSocket connection or using context to prevent double connections
WebSocket reconnection in MessageButton.js: ws.onclose timeout only sets wsRef.current to null after 3s but does not reconnect - users may lose real-time unread updates if connection drops

ChatPanel.js loadMessages(): After calling GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages, the response includes the full conversation data (with property_image) but loadMessages only sets messages, not updating activeConv with the richer data from the response

unread_badge_test_user.note: This user has 1 unread message from admin - good for testing unread badge

seed_data_creation: Created test users: unreadtest_* and unreadtst2_55dc for unread badge testing. Conversations created between admin and test users. Test message sent from admin to unreadtst2_55dc@test.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Messaging system fully tested and validated. Backend: 22 pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_messaging_system.py. Key flows: WebSocket at /api/ws/chat?token=XXX, REST endpoints at /api/conversations, /api/conversations/{id}/messages, /api/conversations/unread-count, /api/users/{id}/online. Frontend: MessageButton in Header (only shows on /immobilier and /procedures paths), ChatPanel component, PropertyBanner in chat. Login route is /connexion (not /login). contact-agent-btn shows only when logged in AND not the property owner. Unread badge works in real-time via WebSocket unread_update events. Minor fix needed: property_image not returned in GET /api/conversations endpoint.
